name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve Schema Docs
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Console Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste console outputs to help explain your problem.

## Environment Details
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
 - Node.js Version: [e.g. v22.11.0]
 - Schema Docs Version: [e.g. v0.1.0]
 - Running Mode: [e.g. Desktop / Web UI / CLI / SDK]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., sample file type, approximate file size, languages used).
